name: Claim denied after machine crushed my hand—what now?
description: Appeal fast with lawyer; add evidence[1].

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after machine crushed my hand—what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal fast with lawyer; add evidence[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal within deadlines, usually 20-30 days.** Gather more evidence like expert medical[1]. **Key factors:** Common reasons: late report, no causation. **Practical guidance:** Lawyer files appeal; Utah Industrial Commission handles[1]. Don't give up—many win on appeal.
